message.content: This section provides a monthly revenue trend analysis for six video game titles. It answers retrieval questions regarding: (1) **Topics & Metrics**: Approximate monthly financial performance (in 万元) and patterns of revenue stability versus volatility; (2) **Entities**: 心动小镇, 出发吧麦芬, 伊瑟, 火炬之光：无限, 香肠派对, and 仙境传说M; (3) **Dates**: Monthly breakdowns from January through December; (4) **Evidence Type**: Structured numerical data lists. The section does not contain definitions, procedures, explicit claims, tables, figures, or external citations. It enables precise retrieval of specific monthly revenue amounts, identification of peak and trough months per title, month-over-month changes, and comparative financial performance across the six games. All figures are explicitly marked as estimates ("约").
